item.description:
What's New in V 1.72

  • 🎙️ Per-shortcut activation mode — choose Toggle, Push to Talk, or Hybrid for each shortcut
  • ⌨️ Power Mode auto-send key — pick Return, Shift+Return, or Cmd+Return to auto-send transcriptions
  • 🚫 Skip short transcriptions — automatically skip AI enhancement for brief responses like "yes" or "ok"
  • 🔄 Latest AI Enhancementmodels — GPT 5.4, Gemini 3.1 Pro, Gemini 3.1 Flash Lite and more
  • ⚡ Faster recording start and smoother performance overall
  • 📋 Brought back AppleScript paste method
  • ✨ Refreshed UI with new sliding panels
  • 🐛 Bug fixes and stability improvements
